subject: english
learning_objectives: Identify words that are frequently misspelt in English
Write the correct spelling of commonly misspelt words

sections.heading: Correct vs. Common Misspellings
sections.content:
Correct spelling → Common misspelling

accommodation → accomodation
acquaint → aquaint
bibliography → bibiography
business → bussiness
clarity → clearify
colossal → colosal
covenant → convenant
diligent → deligent
environment → enviroment
enmity → enimity
expatiate → expantiate
incurred → incured
grievous → grievious
maintenance → maintainance
mischievous → mischievious
necessary → neccessary
pastime → pasttime
pronunciation → pronouncaition
preceded → preceeded
sandwich → sandwitch
referred → refered
separate → seperate

sections.heading: Additional Words to Learn
sections.content: harassment, embarrassment, herculean, workaholic, limousine, buoyant, buoy, boulevard, hippopotamus, stethoscope, obstetrician, pneumonia, choreography, commission, surveillance, agrarian, lovable, duly, gubernatorial, indict, accede, onomatopoeia, Ghanaian, promiscuous, continuous, philanderer, psychiatric, psyche, burlesque, diarrhoea, flirtatious, sarcasm
